profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Review the current account identity and update the personal details the backend stores for you.
profile.editDescription: These changes are saved to `/api/user/profile` and reflected everywhere your account is shown.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell future-you what this account is for.
overview.emptyBio: No profile bio has been saved yet.
overview.activityDescription: This is the default instruction that Ello should carry into your personal account sessions.
overview.emptyPrompt: No system prompt has been saved yet.
overview.securityDescription: Your account status and defaults now come directly from the rewritten single-user backend.
overview.cards.profileDescription: Display name, bio, and timezone are stored directly on your account.
overview.cards.settingsDescription: Locale, theme, and model selection are restored whenever your session comes back.
overview.cards.securityDescription: The backend decides whether this account remains active and whether your sessions stay valid.
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Save the defaults that shape your personal Ello account and keep them in sync with `/api/user/settings`.
settings.formDescription: Choose how Ello should behave each time your session is restored.
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Optional personal instruction that should be loaded by default.
